title: MD5digest
text: MD5digest Produce an MD5 message digest. extern void MD5digest (unsigned char * Value , unsigned int Length , unsigned char * Digest ); Parameters Parameter Direction Description Value IN Data stream for which the digest is to be produced Length IN Length of the data stream Digest OUT 16 byte digest Use Library uenc Description This function is useful for creating security drivers that need to encode and decode data.
